classes.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.base.Run
documentation: Defines a single execution run for an experiment.

classes.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.base.Runtime

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.base.Runtime.interrupt_handler
documentation:
Interrupts signal handler.

All currently running simulators should be stopped cleanly and their
output collected.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.base.Runtime.interrupt
documentation: Signals interrupt to runtime.
Base class for managing the execution of multiple runs.

functions.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.distributed.auto_dist
documentation:
Converts an Experiment into a DistributedExperiment.

Assigns network to executor zero, and then round-robin assignment of hosts
to executors, while also assigning all nics for a host to the same executor.
TODO: FIXME

classes.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalSimpleRuntime

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalSimpleRuntime.do_run
documentation: Actually executes `run`.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalSimpleRuntime.start
documentation: Execute the runs defined in `self.runnable`.
Execute runs locally in sequence.

classes.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalParallelRuntime

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalParallelRuntime.do_run
documentation: Actually executes `run`.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalParallelRuntime.wait_completion
documentation: Wait for any run to terminate and return.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalParallelRuntime.enough_resources
documentation: Check if enough cores and mem are available for the run.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalParallelRuntime.prereq_ready
documentation: Check if the prerequesite run for `run` has completed.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalParallelRuntime.do_start
documentation:
Asynchronously execute the runs defined in `self.runs_noprereq +
self.runs_prereq.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.runs.local.LocalParallelRuntime.start
documentation: Execute all defined runs.
Execute runs locally in parallel on multiple cores.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.simulation_executor.SimulationBaseRunner.start_sim
documentation: Start a simulator and wait for it to be ready.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.simulation_executor.SimulationBaseRunner.wait_for_sims
documentation: Wait for simulators to terminate (the ones marked to wait on).

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.simulation_executor.SimulationBaseRunner.terminate_collect_sims
documentation: Terminates all simulators and collects output.

classes.name: simbricks.runtime.simulation_executor.SimulationSimpleRunner
documentation: Simple experiment runner with just one executor.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.command_executor.Component.wait
documentation:
Wait for running process to finish and output to be collected.

On cancellation, the `CancelledError` is propagated but this component
keeps running.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.command_executor.Component.interrupt
documentation: Sends an interrupt signal.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.command_executor.Component.terminate
documentation: Sends a terminate signal.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.command_executor.Component.kill
documentation: Sends a kill signal.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.command_executor.Component.int_term_kill
documentation:
Attempts to stop this component by sending signals in the following
order: interrupt, terminate, kill.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.command_executor.Component.sigusr1
documentation: Sends an interrupt signal.

methods.name: simbricks.runtime.command_executor.Executor.run_cmdlist
documentation: runs the list of commands as strings sequentially
